seoTitle: Meru vs Metricup — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Meru and Metricup. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Meru and Metricup.
heading: Meru vs Metricup — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Meru, Western Australia and Metricup, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Metricup has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Meru (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Meru or Metricup safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Meru has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Metricup scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Meru scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Metricup scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Meru or Metricup?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Metricup has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
